meta.title: Trash Dex — sort your trash in Korea
meta.description: Scan any waste item and find the right bag, day, and disposal site for your district in Korea. A field guide for residents and travelers.

home.title: Trash Dex
home.subtitle: Scan your trash to learn how to dispose of it correctly in Korea

overlay.no_items: No waste items detected. Try a clearer photo.

tips.title: Tips for better recognition
tips.lighting_body: Take photos in a well-lit area.
tips.distance_body: Fill about half the frame with the item.

video.no_video: No disposal guide available for this item yet.

guide.title: Disposal Guide
guide.subtitle: Rules for {name}
guide.no_district: Set your district from the top bar to see local disposal rules.
guide.pin_step_hint: Tap a step to pin it.

district.unsupported_hint: Disposal rules for {name} aren't available yet. Tap the location pill to switch to Gangnam-gu or Mapo-gu.
district.no_match_hint: We couldn't match your location to a Seoul district. Pick Gangnam-gu or Mapo-gu manually to see disposal rules.
